title: GitHub Pages Delivery
description: Verifies knowledge of the hosting pipeline and repo settings.

questions.question: Which branch should GitHub Pages serve once MkDocs is configured?
questions.explanation: `mkdocs gh-deploy` publishes the built HTML to `gh-pages`, so Pages must serve from that branch.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the Pages settings step after the GitHub Action runs?
options: It turns README files into issues
It tells GitHub which branch/folder to expose as the public site
It encrypts the quizzes JSON files
questions.explanation: Pages must be pointed to `gh-pages` so the build output is actually hosted under the repo's Pages URL.

questions.question: How do you add a custom domain such as `docs.control-panel.io`?
options: Create a CNAME file committed to the repo and add DNS records
questions.explanation: Custom domains require a `CNAME` file in the publishing branch and matching DNS `CNAME` records pointing at GitHub Pages.
